title: nie-wallet crate: Zcash wallet backend
description: New nie-wallet crate in the workspace wrapping zcash_client_backend and librustzcash. Provides key derivation, address generation, block scanning, shielded balance, and transaction sending. All wallet logic lives here; nie-cli depends on it.
notes: CRITICAL: chat startup must never await wallet init or sync. Wallet sync runs as a detached background task. If wallet.key is absent, wallet is simply unavailable — chat works normally. Payment slash commands check wallet availability at call time and return a friendly error if not ready.
close_reason: All components done: key derivation, address generation, block scanner, balance query, tx builder+broadcaster, diversified subaddress, gRPC client, SQLite schema. nie-wallet crate is feature-complete for Phase 2.
